reason: REJECTED (equity-native re-test complete, 2026-07-20). The 'needs an RTH-equity re-test' caveat rested on a false premise that the project had no 5m equity data; it has 21 years of RTH 5m for SPY/QQQ/IWM/DIA. Re-tested faithfully on those (09:30 ET anchor, entry at next bar's open, flat 15:55 ET, 2bp round-turn, stop wins a both-touched bar): n=14,664, WR 42.7%, OOS PF 0.984 against a direction-randomised control of 0.986 - zero directional edge. Per-year PF oscillates 0.63-1.18 across 21 years with no IS/OOS drift. Trades were rendered and inspected: opening range, break, retest, far-side stop and 2R target all match the extracted spec, so this is a strategy verdict, not a harness artifact. Supersedes the earlier PENDING. See research/video_library/PROCESS_AUDIT.md.
